---
title: "Let's do this!"
---


<div class="card text-white bg-primary mb-3">
  <div class="card-body"><p class="card-text">Let's go on a weekend away!</p></div>
</div>

It's been a long year - and it's only July! 

<div class="alert alert-dismissible alert-success">
  <button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="alert"></button>
  <strong>Remember!</strong> Do not hesitate to make suggestions!
</div>
